def positive_redundant_return_none():
    rule_id = "redundant_return_none"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "Explicit return None in simple code paths where Python would already return None implicitly."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
